description_long: This bollard features a tall, slender, black cylindrical post with a flared base for stability. At the top, it is adorned with a decorative finial consisting of a spherical cap and two smaller side spheres, giving it an ornamental appearance. The surface appears to be made of metal, likely cast iron or steel, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. The bollard is designed to be both functional and visually appealing, suitable for urban streetscapes, parks, or pedestrian zones. Its robust construction suggests it is intended to prevent vehicle access while allowing pedestrian flow. There are no visible reflective markings, chains, or connectors for linking to other bollards.
description: A tall, black, decorative metal bollard with a spherical finial and flared base, designed for urban access control.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full height of the bollard, highlighting the decorative finial and flared base.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the slender cylindrical body and the symmetry of the finial at the top.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the post and the rounded cap.
description_view_3: This angled view showcases the ornamental top and the sturdy, flared base.
